mission.title: buildpacks: `pack build` fails with experimental containerd feature enabled in Docker Desktop (macos)
mission.description: `pack build` fails with experimental containerd feature enabled in Docker Desktop (macos). Users encounter: "failed to build: failed to fetch builder image 'index.docker.io/paketobuildpacks/builder:base': imag".

steps.title: Identify buildpacks troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your buildpacks installation:
```bash
pack version
pack builder suggest
```
Look for error: `failed to build: failed to fetch builder image 'index.docker.io/paketobuildpacks/builder:base': image index.docker.io/pa`

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration

steps.title: Confirm `pack build` fails with experimental containerd… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test buildpacks to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `failed to build: failed to fetch builder image 'index.docker.io/paketobuildpacks/builder:base': image index.docker.io/pa` no longer appears.

resolution.summary:
Cross-posting from https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/issues/1853#issuecomment-1677522514:

> We want to research the reason for this bug. the idea will be:

> * Confirm if there is a bug on pack or if this something related to docker.
